chunks.text:
UK Parliament
You appear to have JavaScript disabled in your browser settings. You may find some parts of this website
do not work properly without it enabled. UK Parliament
The UK Parliament has two Houses that work on behalf of UK citizens to check and challenge the work of Government, make and shape effective laws, and debate/make decisions on the big issues of the day. Featured news
View all UK Parliament news
Featured item:
Coming up in the Commons 8-12 December
Find out what's coming up in the Commons from 8-12 December
5 December 2025
Featured item:
What's on in the Lords 8-12 December
Discover what's on in the House of Lords from 8-12 December. 9 December 2025
Featured item:
Lord Gove: Lord Speaker's Corner
Michael Gove, Lord Gove, is the latest guest on Lord Speaker’s Corner as he discusses the fragmentation of British politics, breaking up the Treasury, Brexit and The Celebrity Traitors. Watch or listen now to find out more
8 December 2025
Quick links
House of Commons
Democratically elected house makes laws and checks the work of Government. House of Lords
Checking and shaping draft laws and challenging the work of Government. MPs and Lords
Find Members of Parliament (MPs) and Members of the House of Lords. Votes in Parliament
Find vote results from the House of Commons and House of Lords. Hansard
Read transcripts of debates and find business papers from both Houses. Bills
Keep up to date with the progress of current and draft Bills before Parliament. Committees
Latest news, inquiries and reports from Parliamentary select committees. Research briefings
Browse research, data and analysis from Parliament’s libraries and research bodies. Parliament
Now
View full ParliamentNow website
To view a version of ParliamentNow that is accessible using assistive technologies, please use this link. ParliamentNow presents information from the UK Parliament
annunciator system
, covering both the House of Commons and House of Lords. Similar to annunciator screens on the Parliamentary estate, it provides constantly updated information on what's happening in both chambers. To view ParliamentNow on the UK Parliament website, please use another browser such as Chrome, Firefox, or Edge. Alternatively you can access the ParliamentNow website using the 'View full ParliamentNow website' button. ParliamentNow presents information from the UK Parliament
annunciator system
, covering both the House of Commons and House of Lords. Similar to annunciator screens on the Parliamentary estate, it provides constantly updated information on what's happening in both chambers. Follow the latest business
News
What's on
Latest news from the House of Commons and Houses of Lords. Treasury’s approach to charging for public services has unfair impact on taxpayers
HM Treasury’s passive approach to how fees and charges are set for public services has resulted in large and unfair surpluses and deficits for the taxpayer.

News
What's on
Latest news from the House of Commons and Houses of Lords. Treasury’s approach to charging for public services has unfair impact on taxpayers
HM Treasury’s passive approach to how fees and charges are set for public services has resulted in large and unfair surpluses and deficits for the taxpayer.

chunks.text: on Latest news from the House of Commons and Houses of Lords. Treasury’s approach to charging for public services has unfair impact on taxpayers HM Treasury’s passive approach to how fees and charges are set for public services has resulted in large and unfair surpluses and deficits for the taxpayer. 10 December 2025 Lords Committee criticises delay in implementing recommendations from marine accident reports 09 December 2025 One year on: Prime Minister to face questions on standards in public life and his Government’s ‘Plan for Change’ Sir Keir Starmer MP will attend the Liaison Committee on Monday 15 December at 2.30pm. 09 December 2025 Procedure Committee to hear from Leader of the House of Commons The Rt Hon Sir Alan Campbell MP will appear before the Procedure Committee on Wednesday 10th December, in his first evidence session with the Committee since being appointed as Leader of the House of Commons 09 December 2025 MPs publish BBC response to evidence session follow-up questions The Culture, Media and Sport Committee has published the response from BBC Chair Samir Shah to its letter sent following his appearance in front of the committee last month 09 December 2025 Education Committee publishes Govt’s response to FE and Skills report The Education Committee has published the Government’s response to its report into FE and Skills which made recommendations on strengthening the sector. 09 December 2025 View all UK Parliament news What's on in the House of Commons and House of Lords What's on in the House of Commons and House of Lords. Wednesday 10 December 2025 Dec 10 2025 House Commons Lords Location Select location Show Loading... View the full Parliamentary calendar Watch Watch live and archived coverage of all UK Parliament proceedings taking place in public. Parliament TV Live feeds of debates and committee meetings on Parliament TV. Also access videos of debates and committee meetings dating back to December 2007. Watch on parliamentlive.tv UK Parliament YouTube Watch the latest videos about the work of Parliament on our official YouTube channel Developers Developer hub Resources for developers, including a directory of open data APIs which allow Parliamentary data to be shared publicly Other Parliamentary resources Written questions, answers and statements Find written questions and answers, as well as written statements Statutory Instruments Find Statutory Instruments by title, paper number, and other criteria Treaties Find treaties by title, command paper number, and other criteria Deposited papers Find deposited papers that have been deposited in both houses MPs' Guide to Procedure Practical, clearly written guidance on House of Commons procedure for MPs and their staff Erskine May Browse and search an online version of Erskine May’s treatise on the law, privileges, proceedings Find Members of the House of Commons Enter your postcode to find the name and contact details of your local MP Postcode, MP's name or constituency Search View all MPs Find Members of the House of Lords Enter a name or title to find details about a Member of the House of Lords Name or
